title: Fawn Proof Artifact
description: Machine-readable artifact emitted by Lean proof extraction. Compilation of the extraction module verifies all listed theorems. Decidable propositions are additionally evaluated at runtime.

status.description: verified means all theorems typechecked and all evaluations completed.

comparabilityObligationsSha256.description: SHA-256 of config/comparability-obligations.json that generated the Lean comparability contract.

category.description: Verification tier. tautological: correct by construction or definitional (nothing to verify). comptime_verified: finite-enum property verifiable by Zig comptime exhaustion. lean_verified: quantified over unbounded domains (Lean is necessary). lean_fixture: specific test case exercising a lean_verified theorem.

evaluatedConditions.description: Decidable propositions evaluated at extraction time. Keys are dotted condition identifiers, values are booleans or integers.

eliminationTargets.description: Mapping from proven theorems to runtime branches that can be eliminated.

theorem.description: Lean theorem name that proves the condition.

condition.description: Human-readable description of the proven invariant.

runtimePath.description: Zig source path and function where the runtime branch can be eliminated.
